hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must infer ENV-before-ATTR matching order, systemd-style link rank precedence, and inotify flush-before-reload semantics from cold-plug trace bytes, partial excerpts, and health subcommand output without a patch recipe.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Matcher token resolution, linker rank emission, reload watch gating, collector row bytes, and checker digests must align across four device scopes and two priority bands.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Reverse-engineering behavioral target: public rule_replay_verify outcomes and trace_digest formula are complete while internal precedence tables and watch ordering remain to be inferred from artifacts.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Patching only matcher logic passes excerpt-level health checks but fails cross-format trace_digest; linker-only fixes clear one band yet break priority_high scenarios; reload-only edits leave stale watch state poisoning gamma/delta after reset.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Requires udev/systemd-style policy precedence reasoning (ENV vs ATTR, link rank vs symlink target, inotify ordering) beyond generic config-file editing recipes.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After disclosing rule_replay_verify command, policy_witness schema, trace_digest rule, and scope/band matrix, solver still must infer precedence surfaces and watch coupling from Python sources and binary fixtures.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is not picking one broken rule file among hundreds; multiple matcher/linker/reload paths look plausible until cross-band digest and post-reset bands disambiguate.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single rules fragment or JSON manifest satisfies digest, band precedence, and reset-repeat tests together.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four named device scopes and two priority bands prevent one-off constant patching.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest behavioral prompt does not name resolve_row_a, emit_plan_b, or ensure_gate_c; residual work stays in Python sources.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Anti-cheat blocks static policy_witness writes and test edits; legitimate difficulty is policy precedence inference plus coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a deps/timeout/reward-footer task; core challenge is reproducible effective-policy traces across reload and replay.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spans matcher, linker, and reload package roots with balanced test subsets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates three opaque Python symbols plus lab rebuild, not one-file overwrite.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Solve requires Python logic across matching order, link rank, and watch gate—not one TOML precedence table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns are banned on fix-path symbols; decoys rhyme structurally without sharing names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No validate_rule/infer_udev helpers mirroring prompt bullets on the fix path.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook JSON-schema or HMAC verification implementation task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Sysadmin flavor alone does not carry difficulty; cross-artifact policy precedence invariants do.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Matching order, link rank, watch flush, and reset-phase side effects trade off—cannot satisfy one test in isolation without breaking another.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Dockerized Python lab is realism, not the hardness source.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires experiments across partial excerpts, priority bands, and repeat reset—not one obvious edit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Designed for hard metadata with expected low platform pass rate after disclosure.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four discovery_budget items name latent ENV/ATTR order, link rank precedence, watch-before-reload gate, and reset-phase store mutation with planned locations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: behavioral-target framing gives complete public outcomes without naming fix-path symbols or construction recipe.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three topology_enumeration entries each coordinate matcher, linker, reload, profiles, fixtures, and checker digests with no single-location sufficiency.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic rule_replay_verify CLI with fixed seeds, pytest assertions on digests and row invariants, no subjective grading.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public contract in replay_contract.md and instruction prose defines commands, schemas, scope/band matrix, and recovery without oracle transcript.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert sysadmin with udev/systemd experience can solve in a few hours; oracle stays under 100k LOC.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires professional experience inferring effective device policy from cold-plug traces and cross-format replay evidence.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Mirrors real fleet incidents where udev rule packs drift across reload cycles and symlink targets disagree with systemd link priority.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades terminal policy_witness.json and checker exit codes, not process narration or tool choice.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction alone cannot derive ENV/ATTR order, link rank precedence, watch flush semantics, or reset-phase store coupling; solver must read Python sources, binary trace bytes, and run rule_replay_verify experiments.

discovery_budget.discovery: Cold-plug matcher evaluates ATTR tokens before ENV keys while graded replay bytes expect ENV-first precedence for priority_high band batches
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Would collapse reverse-engineering to editing one matching helper instead of inferring order from divergent excerpts

discovery_budget.discovery: Linker emits symlink target paths while systemd-style link rank from priority band tables must override raw target selection
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the broken rank phase would turn partial observability into a grep target

discovery_budget.discovery: Reload path applies rule files before draining pending inotify watch events, leaving stale effective policy after cold-plug sequences
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Revealing watch ordering would reduce cross-artifact reconciliation to a one-knob transcription

discovery_budget.discovery: Repeat reset via migrations/reset_rules.sh mutates rule_store scratch used by later replay even when health subcommands report clean status
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Instruction documents reset command and symptoms only; exact store coupling is discovered by rerunning checker grid

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public rule_replay_verify grid, trace_digest formula, false-green stage tallies, and recovery command are complete; fix-path Python symbols and internal phase ordering remain open.

attack_path.summary: Hand-write policy_witness.json from health subcommand counts or patch only matcher for alpha scope
attack_path.reasoning: Both shortcuts fail test_cross_format_byte_hash and band-b obligation tests because checker rebuilds canonical replay bytes from patched Python sources and compares digests independent of stage JSON.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate ENV/ATTR matching order, link rank emission, and watch gate across three Python packages
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Any single-package tweak leaves at least two test subsets failing: health-only fixes pass test_stub_totals_trap but fail cross-format digest; linker-only fixes pass dual-band smoke but fail reset-repeat guard after documented recovery.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure residual work requires inferring config policy precedence across matcher/linker/reload, not mapping one public formula to one obvious function.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After replay_contract.md exposes trace_digest and scope/band matrix, solver must still determine which precedence surface wins per band, how watch flush interacts with reload, and why health subcommands disagree with graded witness bytes.

topology_enumeration.summary: ENV-first matcher plus link-rank override plus watch-flush-before-reload
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Correct matcher alone fails priority_low band scenarios; linker-only fixes break alpha/gamma symlink rows; reload-only edits leave wrong token bytes upstream.

topology_enumeration.summary: ATTR-late matcher with rank-from-band-table after documented reset recovery
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Reset repeat poisons rule_store consumed by reload gate; excerpt-only inference misidentifies matching order without band table; checker driver needs all three Python roots rebuilt.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format digest reconciliation from conflicting health and trace evidence surfaces
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Interim stub satisfies health counts but not trace_digest; contract doc gives formula not precedence authority; scenarios impose distinct cold-plug shapes requiring coordinated matcher and linker semantics.

symbol_table.signature: def resolve_row_a(row: TraceRow, catalog: SlotCatalog) -> SlotId:
symbol_table.purpose: Maps cold-plug row to catalog slot using band-selected matching strategy

symbol_table.signature: def emit_plan_b(spec: LinkSpec, target: SymlinkRef, site: RankSite) -> LinkPlan:
symbol_table.purpose: Emits ranked link plan bytes respecting band-specific precedence

symbol_table.signature: def ensure_gate_c(store: RuleStore, watch: WatchRef) -> GateState:
symbol_table.purpose: Evaluates whether pending watch notifications must flush before rule reload

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Deprecated ENV table used only by offline benchmarks
No-op link planner for simulator builds without rank bands
Formats replay rows without mutating watch or rank state

renames_during_drafting.reason: Original name embedded instruction nouns scope and band
Original name embedded instruction noun partial
Original name embedded instruction nouns idempotent and reset
Original name embedded instruction noun grid
Original symbol embedded instruction noun token
Original symbol embedded instruction noun rank

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: sequential rule_replay_verify grid after migrations/reset_rules.sh and build_lab.sh
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models treat reset as idempotent on visible health tallies and skip rule_store coupling across replay phases
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Recovery command documented in replay_contract.md with idempotent rerun semantics

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Agents treat matching health counts as completion while trace_digest fails
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction states terminal policy_witness.json from full --all-scopes run is graded

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Single-scope replay checks pass before cross-band digest convergence
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Public contract names graded artifact and cross-band digest bands

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: policy_witness.json trace_digest vs canonical collector replay bytes
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models edit JSON summaries without rebuilding emitted replay rows
Models infer matching order from incomplete textual excerpts alone
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction names authoritative binary bytes and four-scope checker grid

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models assume generic udev helper behavior instead of band-scoped replay semantics
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction names exact rule_replay_verify command and priority band labels

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Systems administrator reproduces failing rule_replay_verify locally using bundled trace bytes and excerpts only
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: Block hardcoded policy_witness.json, fragment-only edits without engine rebuild, test modifications
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: Remove partial-excerpt layer, then digest layer, then health-subcommand layer; expect monotonic difficulty drop

pass_rate_target.basis: Part E Hard threshold on worst-model accuracy; verifier-offline via Dockerfile-baked pytest with no runtime installs in test.sh under allow_internet=false; post-upload difficulty classification after platform agent runs

metrics.criterion: rule_replay_verify exit 0 and policy_witness rows match rebuilt replay bytes for all scope/band pairs
cross-band trace_digest and row-width invariants hold after reset repeat
no stale rule_store scratch or pending watch queues after documented recovery
policy_witness.json schema and CLI flags match replay_contract.md

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt=1 only when all weighted metrics pass

subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: Single-container local verifier; Python lab and rule_replay_verify baked in Dockerfile

platform_files.role: verifier entrypoint; invoke pre-installed tools only
build definition; pre-install python, pytest, lab package

task_files.role: witness schema, trace_digest rule, recovery command
public cold-plug row semantics and status tokens

fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque symbols from construction manifest symbol_table only
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Decoys may rhyme structurally; oracle must not edit decoy bodies

task_shape.collapse_risk: single magic constant or hidden-instance lookup

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Observable cold-plug traces, public rule_replay_verify command, effective-policy outcomes, reload behavior, policy_witness schema, partial excerpts, recovery command, scope/band matrix
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Root cause, fix location, patch recipe, oracle transcript, fix-path symbol names, internal precedence table location
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Matcher, linker, reload, collector emission, and checker digests coordinate across four device scopes and two priority bands
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: False greens from health subcommands or golden fixtures, policy-table transcription, one config file shortcut
category_profile.coverage_role: Strengthens config_policy_precedence coverage via udev rule trace inference (distinct from perf-trace-event-inference)

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low — opaque fix-path symbols precommitted in symbol_table
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low — contract uses digests and row invariants, not boolean verdict tables
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low — frontier spans three Python package roots with decoys
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: medium — trace_digest and watch-flush rules live in replay_contract.md and checker behavior

actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: yes — fix Python sources under /app/environment and rebuild; no patch recipe

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Hardness from coupled udev policy precedence behavior, not harness brittleness

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: No promoted reference in docs/reference_tasks/index.json covers Python reverse-engineered udev rule trace inference with cross-band digest witnesses; perf-trace-event-inference is Rust-shaped and not promoted

realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Minimized from production fleet udev/systemd incidents: ENV/ATTR matching order drifted across reload, systemd link priority disagreed with symlink targets, and inotify events raced rule load leaving stale effective policy on cold-plug
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Causal coupling between matcher precedence, link rank bands, watch flush ordering, and graded replay witnesses
